title: BuildMate Calculators | Project calculators for materials, quantities and job costs
meta_description: Estimate paint, tiles, flooring, concrete, gravel, paving and other project quantities with practical calculators built for real jobs.
hero_heading: Estimate materials, quantities and project costs faster.
hero_text: BuildMate Calculators is designed around real search intent: people who want quick answers for paint, tiles, flooring, concrete, gravel, decking, fencing and renovation jobs.
hero_points: Built for global English traffic with practical project-led keywords
Designed for ads first, with affiliate and lead paths later
hero_panel_text: The first build should focus on material calculators with obvious search demand, strong utility and evergreen formulas.
features_heading: A search-first calculator site structure that can scale cleanly.
features_text: The site is being positioned around useful estimators that solve practical problems fast, rather than broad informational content.

feature_cards.title: Higher-intent long tails
feature_cards.text: The strongest early pages are material and quantity estimators where the user wants a quick number, not a long article.

feature_cards.title: Minimal maintenance
feature_cards.text: Coverage assumptions, waste percentages and measurement formulas can stay useful for long periods with only occasional tuning.

feature_cards.title: Ads first, more later
feature_cards.text: The template is designed so ad placements can be added later without harming usability, and the same pages can support affiliate or lead CTAs.

categories_heading: Start with the strongest search clusters, then expand outward.
categories_text: Initial categories are ordered around likely traffic potential and usefulness for project-based searches.

category_cards.title: Paint, tiles and flooring
category_cards.text: High search demand, broad use cases and simple practical inputs make this the strongest first wave.

category_cards.title: Concrete, gravel and aggregates
category_cards.text: Strong problem-solving intent and good monetisation potential through materials and project products later.

category_cards.title: Decking, paving and fencing
category_cards.text: Good intent, strong adjacency to outdoor project searches and easy future expansion into cost estimates.

calculators_text: These initial calculators are set up as the strongest first batch before we move into deeper variants and long-tail combinations.
